summary: Add `lookup <email>` command: GET /v2/profile for live contact enrichment (name, bio, location, timezone, avatar, social links, Twitter handle) with optional --photo download from /contact/<email>/photo.
reason: 2026-05-27 iOS sniff surfaced two contact endpoints reachable with the existing cookie-derived JWT (no iOS-audience token needed). The CLI had no live contact-lookup command (participants is local-cache only; profile is saved flag-sets). Verified live: /v2/profile and /contact/<email>/photo both return 200.
validated_outcome: lookup_test.go: happy-path parse, --select filtering, --photo write, 404 no-photo graceful, sparse-body, malformed-email rejection, 500 error. Live: lookup mvanhorn@gmail.com returned full profile + 140x140 JPEG.
